zh.Horsley, Belper, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾霍斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Peshale II於大約1277年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，他的父親Richard Swynnerton de Peshale50歲，母親Margery Knighton34歲。他於1322年之前與Joan de Eyton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年1月8日在英國德比夏爾霍斯利享年70歲。

zh-hans.Horsley, Belper, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾霍斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Peshale II于大约1277年出生在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，他的父亲Richard Swynnerton de Peshale50岁，母亲Margery Knighton34岁。他于1322年之前与Joan de Eyton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年1月8日在英国德比夏爾霍斯利享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peshale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from any of more than two dozen places called Penhale in Cornwall, or from places of similar name in Wales, such as Pennal (Merioneths), or from Penheale in Egloskerry (Cornwall). The Cornish places named Penhale derive from Middle Cornish * pen hal ‘moor’s head, marsh’s head’ ( pen ‘head, top, end; promontory’, hal ‘moor, marsh’); Pennal (Merioneths) has the same meaning. Penheale derives from Middle Cornish pen + hel ‘hall’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Peshale II was born about 1277, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, his father, Richard Swynnerton de Peshale, was 50 and his mother, Margery Knighton, was 34. He married Joan de Eyton before 1322. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 January 1346, in Horsley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Peshale II est né environ 1277, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Swynnerton de Peshale, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margery Knighton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan d’Eyton avant 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1346, à Horsley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Peshale II um 1277 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Swynnerton de Peshale 50 und seine Mutter Margery Knighton 34. Er hat vor 1322 Joan de Eyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1346 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Horsley, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Peshale II è nato il circa 1277 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Swynnerton de Peshale, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Margery Knighton, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Eyton prima del 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1346, nel Horsley, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Peshale IIが約1277年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Richard Swynnerton de Peshaleは50歳，母Margery Knightonは34歳であった。1322年以前にJoan de Eytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年1月8日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアホールスリーで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Peshale II(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스w이너턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Swynnerton de Peshale(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Knighton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1322년 이전 Joan de Eyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 1월 8일 영국 더비실르 호르슬리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Horsley, Belper, Derbyshire, England: Horsley, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Peshale II nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Swynnerton de Peshale, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margery Knighton, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Eyton antes 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1346, em Horsley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Peshale II родился около 1277 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Swynnerton de Peshale было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Knighton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Eyton перед 1322 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 января 1346 г. в местности хаурсли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

sm.from 1330 to 1340: mai le 1330 e o'o I le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Peshale II nació aproximadamente 1277, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Swynnerton de Peshale, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margery Knighton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joan de Eyton antes de 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de enero de 1346, en Horsley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
